data.name: 無盡虛空傳說：第1季
data.detailed_description:
第1季

這是遊戲的第1季，包含12集，構成了故事的第一幕。剩餘兩季仍在製作中，待開發完成後將在Steam上線。


額外內容

此處出售的是遊戲的未刪減版，包含27個額外的性愛場景，主角和衆多配角均有出演。遊戲安裝目錄中包含一組額外美術作品和一份攻略。


關於此遊戲

故事

卡姆蘭是一位來自「至高權域」星域的年輕小貴族，而「至高權域」星域是人類統治的太空區域。卡姆曾是人族星系艦隊學院的學員，迫於形勢，他和一羣朋友一起在星系中穿梭，從事着卑微的工作，偶爾還會走私一些非法貨物。當他不自覺地捲入權勢顯赫的陰謀家們策劃的邪惡計劃時，卡姆蘭的人生從此發生了改變……

遊戲玩法

遊戲以各種選擇爲基礎，這些選擇將影響劇情。玩家可以追尋多個愛情目標，無論是外星人還是人類，每個目標都有各自的背景故事。

遊戲特點

  • 包含第1至12集

  • 超過5000張渲染圖

  • 超過250個動畫，增強了遊戲中的衆多情色場景

  • 數小時的分支劇情，提供重玩性

  • 豐富且氛圍濃鬱的配樂

  • 所有性愛場景均可重播

  • 詳細介紹遊戲中各種角色、種族、星球和地點的百科資料庫

  • 60個成就

  • 官方英文遊戲指南（點擊遊戲主菜單中的「獎勵」按鈕）

  • 獎勵藝術作品，展現了遊戲中衆多女性角色（點擊遊戲主菜單中的「附加內容」按鈕）

性內容

本遊戲包含露骨的性內容，包括但不限於後宮、肛交、女同性戀、墮落、偷窺、自慰、跨性別/扶他（可選）、羣交（可選）、BDSM（受虐狂和支配者，可選）、懷孕（可選）、中出、顏射、水上運動等等！

data.short_description: 卡姆蘭(Camran)，貴族，走私犯，在星系中遊蕩。當他參與到邪惡的計劃中時，他的人生發生了翻天覆地的變化……踏上這場情色冒險，漫遊星系，揭開將永遠改變宇宙的陰謀！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 義大利文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文, 法文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
data.reviews:
““總的來說，這款遊戲非常出色，尤其適合喜歡太空旅行和科幻故事的玩家。””
4.7/5 – LewdPixels

“「我強烈推薦你去試試《TFTUV》（無盡虛空傳說）。故事精彩，人物有趣，性互動豐富多彩，最重要的是，第1季的結局很真實，會讓你感到滿足，同時也對第2季充滿期待。」”
Sex Positive Gaming

  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Tales From The Unending Void: Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Season One

This is season one of the game, containing 12 episodes that make up the first act of the story. The remaining two seasons are still in production and will be released on Steam once development of each has finished.


Extras

The version on sale here is the bonus edition of the game containing 27 extra sex scenes featuring the main characters and a lot of the side girls. A set of bonus artwork and a walkthrough guide are located in the game's install directory.


About the Game

Story

Camran is a young minor noble from the Sovereignty, a part of space dominated by humans. Erstwhile cadet of the Terran Naval Academy, Cam has been forced by circumstances to travel the galaxy, together with a band of friends, taking on menial jobs and occasionally smuggling some illicit cargo. As he involuntarily becomes part of sinister plans machinated by powerful intrigants, Camran’s life is changed forever…

Gameplay

The game is built on choices that will have an impact on the narrative. Multiple love interests, alien and human, are available to be pursued, each with their own backstory.

Features

  • Contains Episode 1 through 12

  • Over 5000 renders

  • Over 250 animations enhancing the many erotic scenes in the game

  • Hours of branching story, offering replayability

  • Rich and atmospheric soundtrack

  • Scene replay for all sex scenes

  • Codex detailing the various characters, species, planets and places in the game

  • 60 achievements

  • Official English Game guide (press the "Bonus" button in the game's main menu)

  • Bonus artwork featuring the many women in the game (press the "Bonus" button in the game's main menu)

Sexual Content

The game contains explicit sexual content including (but not limited to) harem, anal, lesbian, corruption, voyeurism, masturbation, trans/futanari (optional), group sex (optional), BDSM (sub & dom, optional), pregnancy (optional), creampies, facials, watersports and much more!

data.short_description: Camran, nobleman and smuggler, roams the galaxy. As he becomes part of sinister plans, his life is changed for good... Roam the galaxy in this erotic adventure to unravel the plot that will change the universe forever!
data.supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Italian, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Turkish, French, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
data.reviews:
“Overall the game is really good, especially if you enjoy space travel and Sci-Fi stories.”
4.7/5 – LewdPixels

“I highly recommend checking out TFTUV. The story is great, the characters are interesting, the sexual interactions are varied and, most importantly, Season One ends at an actual ending point that will leave you satisfied, but excited for Season Two.”
Sex Positive Gaming
